response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for 'Bitter Choco Decoration' and 'Deal with the devil'. The JSON contains full song lyrics, but I have truncated the output to only match the specific verses and speech segments present in this 5-minute video clip. I have also transcribed the fast rap section of the first song and the mid-video spoken interlude involving the dice roll, ensuring all vocalized audio is precisely synchronized with the start and end of each vocal burst.

subtitles.original: や、や、や、や、や、嫌
